title: Made Well — Inner Store (cycles/<id>.json)
description: The INNER store: one per spawned Cycle, ephemeral. Born at Commit->Build, removed at Land. Holds the Imagine queue and the inner phase pointer. Many can exist at once (one per concurrent Cycle); a Cycle that spawns sub-cycles mints more of these.

parent.description: The discovery item id (or parent cycle id) this Cycle came from.

imagine.description: THE INNER QUEUE. The smallest completable items this Cycle breaks into. The inner loop drains this through Plan -> Make -> Verify.

dependsOn.description: Item ids this depends on (set during Plan).

brief.description: Path to the brief written at Make, e.g. .madewell/specs/2026-06-21-description.md
